assumptions.notes: XP curve base. Level 1 starts at 0 XP.
Common enemy XP at level 1 before rarity modifier.
Enemy XP scales with enemy level.
Players sell items for 28% of base value.
Full repair costs 18% of base item value.
Upgrade cost uses item base value × this factor × upgrade level curve.
Shop prices are 25% above base item value.
Daily quest gold roughly equals 10 normal kills at zone level.
Approximate fights needed if killing level-appropriate common enemies.

shopPrices.notes: Contains common weapon near player level.
Contains common chest near player level.
Contains rivets, chain links, guard insignia chance.
Guarantees next encounter has elite roll bonus.

economyRules.rule: Gold should not be the main blocker before level 10
economyRules.why_it_exists: Early game should teach systems, not punish experimentation.

economyRules.rule: Rare items sell for meaningful gold, but not enough to buy all upgrades
Repair is a soft gold sink
economyRules.why_it_exists: Creates maintenance pressure without stopping play.
Prevents frustration while preserving loot chase.

economyRules.rule: Upgrades should not replace item progression
economyRules.why_it_exists: Prevents low-level item from being optimal forever.

economyRules.value: Elite gold ≈ 3x common; elite XP ≈ 2.75x common
